name: vw_combined_data
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_combined_data AS SELECT w.District, w.Crop, w.Irrigation_method, w.Water_consumption_liters_per_hectare, c.Area_hectares, c.Yield_quintals FROM water_usage_data w JOIN crop_production_data c ON w.District = c.District AND w.Crop = c.Crop

name: vw_irrigation_efficiency
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_irrigation_efficiency AS SELECT i.Irrigation_method, AVG(w.Water_consumption_liters_per_hectare / c.Area_hectares / c.Yield_quintals) AS Water_Usage_Efficiency FROM water_usage_data w JOIN crop_production_data c ON w.District = c.District AND w.Crop = c.Crop JOIN vw_combined_data i ON w.District = i.District AND w.Crop = i.Crop GROUP BY i.Irrigation_method, i.Crop

name: vw_soil_data
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_soil_data AS SELECT s.pH_Level, s.Organic_Matter_percent, i.Irrigation_method, AVG(w.Water_consumption_liters_per_hectare / c.Area_hectares / c.Yield_quintals) AS Water_Usage_Efficiency FROM soil_analysis_data s JOIN vw_combined_data i ON s.District = i.District AND s.soil_type = (CASE WHEN s.District LIKE '%Jodhpur' THEN 'Black lava soil' WHEN s.District LIKE '%Kota' THEN 'Saline' WHEN s.District LIKE '%Ajmer' THEN 'Clay' WHEN s.District LIKE '%Jaipur' THEN 'Alkaline' WHEN s.District LIKE '%Udaipur' THEN 'Nitrogenous' END) JOIN water_usage_data w ON i.District = w.District AND i.Crop = w.Crop JOIN crop_production_data c ON i.District = c.District AND i.Crop = c.Crop GROUP BY s.pH_Level, s.Organic_Matter_percent, i.Irrigation_method, i.Crop

name: vw_season_data
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_season_data AS SELECT s.Season, i.Irrigation_method, AVG(w.Water_consumption_liters_per_hectare / c.Area_hectares / c.Yield_quintals) AS Water_Usage_Efficiency FROM crop_production_data s JOIN water_usage_data w ON s.District = w.District AND s.Crop = w.Crop JOIN vw_combined_data i ON w.District = i.District AND w.Crop = i.Crop GROUP BY s.Season, i.Irrigation_method, i.Crop
